data.title: LPA Announces Reporting Dates for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Logistic Properties of the Americas (NYSE American: LPA), a prominent developer, owner, and manager of top-notch industrial and logistics real estate in Central and South America, disclosed its plans for releasing the First Quarter 2026 financial results. The Earnings Release is scheduled for Wednesday, May 13, 2026, after the market closes. Subsequently, a Conference Call will be held on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET | 8:00 a.m. CT for interested individuals to participate.

data.title: Clearway Energy, Inc. Announces Results of 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
data.description: Shareholders have voted in favor of a proposal to simplify the public share class structure. This decision is significant as it will streamline the structure and potentially enhance shareholder value. The move was backed by a majority of shareholders, with approximately X% voting in favor of the proposal. This development marks a significant step towards creating a more efficient and transparent share class system. The proposal aims to reduce complexity and improve clarity for investors and is expected to have a positive impact on the company's overall performance.

data.title: GoNoodle and Great Wolf Lodge Partner to Bring Adventure, Movement, and Imagination to Kids Everywhere
data.description: A groundbreaking video experience with Squatchy Berger is now available at a popular family resort, offering an interactive and fun way for children to engage with storytelling and movement. The initiative was launched by GoNoodle, a prominent platform promoting physical activity and mindfulness for kids, on April 29, 2026 in Atlanta. This new experience brings a splash of excitement to classrooms and households, underscoring the importance of active engagement in a child's routine.

data.title: WorkFusion, a UiPath Company, Ranked #5 in Everest Group's Top 50™ Financial Crime and Compliance (FCC) Technology Providers 2026
data.description: Today in New York on April 29, 2026, WorkFusion, a UiPath Company known for its AI agents in financial crime compliance (FCC), revealed that it has been ranked #5 by Everest Group in the global listing of Top 50™ FCC Technology Providers. This prestigious annual ranking highlights the company's position among the top players in the industry.

data.title: Why Ebay Shares Are Seesawing Wednesday
data.description: Ebay Inc (NASDAQ: EBAY) released its Q1 financial results after the market closed on Wednesday. The company reported a revenue of $3.1 billion for the quarter, which marked a 19% increase from the previous year. This revenue surpassed the Street's estimate of $3 billion. Earnings per share were reported at $1.66, also beating the Street's estimate of $1.58. The gross merchandise volume for the quarter was $22.2 billion, showing an 18% increase year-over-year. Despite the positive financial results, eBay's stock is currently displaying weakness. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hawthorn Bancshares Announces Cash Dividend
data.description: Today, Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HWBK) based in Jefferson City, Missouri, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.21 per common share. The approved dividend will be paid on July 1, 2026, to shareholders holding shares as of June 15, 2026.

data.title: Wesley N. Slagle Elected to the RPC, Inc. Board of Directors
data.description: On April 29, 2026, RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) revealed the appointment of Wesley N. Slagle to their Board of Directors. Slagle, President of RFA Management Company, LLC and a U.S. Naval Academy graduate with a B.S. in systems engineering, joins the board.

data.title: Chip Gear Supplier KLA Posts Beat-And-Raise Fiscal Q3, But Stock Falls Late
data.description: KLA, a vendor of semiconductor equipment, exceeded expectations for its fiscal third quarter and provided a positive outlook for fiscal Q4. Despite this, KLAC stock experienced a decline following the news.

data.title: Meta Posts Fastest Revenue Growth Since 2021. The Stock Is Sliding Anyway.
data.description: The stock of Meta dropped in late trading on Wednesday following the release of its first-quarter results, which exceeded expectations. Meta showcased its fastest revenue growth since 2021.

data.title: Google Stock Climbs On Q1 Earnings As Cloud Revenue, 'Backlog' Booms
data.description: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, reported a significant increase in Q1 earnings, leading to a rise in Google's stock value. The growth was fueled by strong performances in cloud computing and search advertisements. The company's investments in AI also contributed to this success. The positive financial results indicated a boom in cloud revenue and a growing 'backlog'. Overall, Google's stock climbed as investors reacted positively to the impressive Q1 earnings report.

data.title: Microsoft Beats Fiscal Q3 Views On Cloud Computing, AI Strength
data.description: In the latest fiscal third quarter, Microsoft surpassed Wall Street expectations, showcasing its robust performance in AI and cloud computing. The tech giant outperformed analyst estimates for the quarter. The impressive success was largely attributed to the strong growth in its AI and cloud computing divisions. This achievement highlights Microsoft's ability to excel in the rapidly expanding tech market. The company's proficiency in leveraging these advanced technologies has resulted in exceeding projections set by investors.
Alphabet CEO Pichai: We've reduced the cost of AI responses by 30% due to progress. $GOOGL

data.title: Amazon Beats Expectations, Reports Strong Cloud Growth. But Stock Slides.
data.description: Shares of Amazon experienced a decline in after-hours trading on Wednesday following the announcement of their first-quarter results, which surpassed projections thanks to robust cloud growth. The company provided a somewhat varied forecast for the upcoming quarter. While Amazon outperformed expectations and reported substantial advancements in its cloud services, its stock faced a downturn following the news.

data.title: Valero Energy Earnings To Skyrocket As Crack Spreads Soar Amid Iran War
data.description: In the first quarter, Valero is projected to see its earnings increase by over 200%, driven by a significant surge in refining crack spreads due to the ongoing tensions in Iran. The market response was positive, with Valero's stock notably rising. This news emphasizes the remarkable growth in Valero Energy's earnings as crack spreads reach unprecedented levels amid the conflict with Iran.

data.title: Teva Surges 12% — And It's Not Completely Tied To Earnings
data.description: Shares of Teva Pharmaceuticals surged by 12% in early trading on Wednesday following a robust first-quarter financial report. However, the stock was also uplifted by another agreement, contributing to the positive momentum. The significant increase in Teva's stock price was not exclusively driven by its earnings performance.

data.title: Fed Rate Cuts On Ice As Powell Passes Torch (But Won't Go); S&P 500 Slips
data.description: The future of Powell, the Federal Reserve chairman, remains uncertain, with decisions on interest rates and balance sheet policies dependent on data. Following a pause on rate cuts, the S&P 500 index experienced a slight decline. Powell is not stepping down from his position, but is transitioning responsibilities.
